description: Project idea pipeline — all ideas, bugs, and improvement requests before WP entry

status_legend.open: No fate decision yet — requires Team 00 + Nimrod review
status_legend.closed: Fate decided and actioned. From pipeline perspective: done. Delivery_ref = canonical WP ID or artifact.

closed_result_legend.fulfilled: closed-green — idea was executed: merged into WP, became WP, or done directly (fate: merged | new_wp | done)
closed_result_legend.cancelled: closed-red — idea was not pursued (fate: cancelled)

fate_legend.merged: Absorbed into an existing WP — delivery_ref = WP ID from roadmap.yaml
fate_legend.new_wp: Became its own WP — delivery_ref = WP ID (or 'backlog' if not yet assigned to a WP)
fate_legend.done: Executed directly in ≤1 session, no WP — delivery_ref = commit hash or file path
fate_legend.cancelled: Not pursuing — delivery_ref = N/A_CANCEL, reason in fate_rationale

delivery_ref_rule.rule: delivery_ref = canonical WP ID from roadmap.yaml (merged/new_wp), commit/file (done), N/A_CANCEL (cancelled). NOT a LOD artifact path. NOT an LOD500 path.
delivery_ref_rule.backlog: For new_wp ideas not yet assigned to a specific WP: delivery_ref = 'backlog'
delivery_ref_rule.pipeline_closure: An idea is closed the moment its fate is decided and actioned (WP created, WP assigned, executed, or cancelled). Whether the WP shipped is roadmap.yaml's concern, not the pipeline's.
